title: Limitations
full_text:
8.4.1.3 Limitations
Limitations
1) Compliance with this Part shall be subject to the limitations stated in
Sections 3.4., 4.4., 5.4., 6.4. and 7.4.

sentences.text: Compliance with this Part shall be subject to the limitations stated in Sections 3.4., 4.4., 5.4., 6.4. and 7.4.
